_doc: Terminal SUCCESS transfer snapshot. The stall watch (RESEARCH §No-progress stall watch) treats a state containing both 'Completed' AND 'Succeeded' as terminal success. [ASSUMED] the exact compound state string pending the 04-05 live probe (A3) — later-wave tests MUST reference this via a named constant (e.g. STATE_COMPLETED_SUCCEEDED), never a literal, so the live string can be pinned in one place.
